Model before rewriting:

letting n be 8
letting nDomain be domain int(0..((n - 1)))
find quasiGroup: matrix indexed by [nDomain, nDomain] of nDomain
find qgDiagonal: matrix indexed by [nDomain] of nDomain

such that

and([ qgDiagonal[i] = quasiGroup[i, i] | i : nDomain ]),
and([ allDifferent(quasiGroup[row,..]) | row : nDomain ]),
and([ allDifferent(quasiGroup[..,col]) | col : nDomain ]),
and([ and([ quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], quasiGroup[j, i]] = i | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
allDifferent(qgDiagonal),
and([ and([ (i != j) -> (quasiGroup[i, j] != quasiGroup[j, i]) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
and([ and([ (quasiGroup[i, i] = j) -> (quasiGroup[j, j] = i) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
and([ sum([quasiGroup[i, (n - 1)],2;int(1..)]) >= i | i : nDomain ])

--

and([ qgDiagonal[i] = quasiGroup[i, i] | i : nDomain ]),
and([ allDifferent(quasiGroup[row,..]) | row : nDomain ]),
and([ allDifferent(quasiGroup[..,col]) | col : nDomain ]),
and([ and([ quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], quasiGroup[j, i]] = i | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
allDifferent(qgDiagonal),
and([ and([ (i != j) -> (quasiGroup[i, j] != quasiGroup[j, i]) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
and([ and([ (quasiGroup[i, i] = j) -> (quasiGroup[j, j] = i) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
and([ sum([quasiGroup[i, (n - 1)],2;int(1..)]) >= i | i : nDomain ])
   ~~> constant_evaluator ([("Constant", 9001)])
and([ qgDiagonal[i] = quasiGroup[i, i] | i : nDomain ]),

and([ and([ quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], quasiGroup[j, i]] = i | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ]),
allDifferent(qgDiagonal),

and([ sum([quasiGroup[i, 7],2;int(1..)]) >= i | i : nDomain ])

--

and([ and([ quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], quasiGroup[j, i]] = i | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ])
   ~~> merge_nested_ac_comprehensions ([("Base", 8900)])
and([ quasiGroup[quasiGroup[i, j], quasiGroup[j, i]] = i | i : nDomain, j : nDomain ])

--

and([ and([ (i != j) -> (quasiGroup[i, j] != quasiGroup[j, i]) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ])
   ~~> merge_nested_ac_comprehensions ([("Base", 8900)])
and([ (i != j) -> (quasiGroup[i, j] != quasiGroup[j, i]) | i : nDomain, j : nDomain ])

--

and([ and([ (quasiGroup[i, i] = j) -> (quasiGroup[j, j] = i) | j : nDomain ]) | i : nDomain ])
   ~~> merge_nested_ac_comprehensions ([("Base", 8900)])
and([ (quasiGroup[i, i] = j) -> (quasiGroup[j, j] = i) | i : nDomain, j : nDomain ])

--
